title: adopt/materialize output
description: Output Contract for adopt/materialize (ADR-0088): the reviewable adopted bundle the pod emits — relative file path -> CaC content (Named Kinds, adopted-from stamped), plus the adoption report (residual gaps + the cutover guard, §1.8). Captured as the Run's typed outputs (Run provenance, §1.2); the operator commits it to Git.

files.description: relative file path -> Named-Kind CaC content

report.description: the adoption report (residual gaps, cutover guard)
